title: TechnicalSpec
description: Schema for forge-harness's living TECHNICAL-SPEC.md. The Markdown file MUST begin with a YAML front-matter block matching `frontMatter`; the body MUST contain one `## story: <id>` heading per entry in `frontMatter.stories[]`, each followed by the four named subsections in `bodySectionsRequired`. Validators parse the Markdown into the shape described here.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned to 1.0.0 for v0.36.0; bumps require coordinated reader updates.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent spec mutation across all stories.

stories.description: Per-story registry. Order MUST match the order of `## story:` headings in the body. Each entry's `lastUpdated` is the per-story mutation stamp; the top-level `lastUpdated` is the max across all entries.

id.description: Story identifier matching the body heading `## story: <id>`.

lastGitSha.description: 40-char hex SHA captured at the PASS that produced this section, or the literal string `unknown` when git was not available.

bodySectionsRequired.description: Required subsections under each `## story: <id>` heading. The validator asserts each `### <name>` heading is present (case-sensitive, in any order).
